description: Labeled diff scenarios for the pr-review skill. Each case lists the findings a correct review must produce. A regression = an expected finding stops being produced, or a clean case starts producing findings. Every name used here is fictional.

cases.name: real-participant-data-in-test
cases.diff: tests/test_secret_santa.py: the fixture is replaced by the real participants copied from config/settings.yaml, with their actual gmail addresses

expected_findings.reason: participants' real names and emails committed in a versioned test

cases.name: credentials-inlined-in-source
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/config.py: `return os.getenv('PASSWORD')` replaced with a literal app password as the fallback default

expected_findings.reason: credential hardcoded in a versioned file instead of living in .env

cases.name: send-becomes-the-default
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/__main__.py: `ejecutar_completo(enviar=...)` default changed from False to True, and `--enviar` becomes `--simular`

expected_findings.reason: real sending must stay opt-in; the default run cannot open an SMTP connection

cases.name: assignment-loses-the-single-cycle
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/services/secret_santa.py: the cycle is replaced by pairing people two by two (`personas[i] <-> personas[i+1]`)

expected_findings.reason: mutual pairs are sub-cycles: it is no longer a single cycle over all participants
changed behavior with no covering test

cases.name: restriction-checked-in-one-direction
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/validators.py: the frozenset lookup is replaced by a list of ordered tuples `(a, b)`

expected_findings.reason: restrictions stop being symmetric: A-B would be rejected but B-A allowed

cases.name: test-opens-a-real-connection
cases.diff: tests/test_email_service.py: new test calling enviar_email() without patching smtplib.SMTP_SSL

expected_findings.reason: a test that opens an SMTP socket hits the network and leaks credentials usage

cases.name: assignment-test-asserts-a-fixed-mapping
cases.diff: tests/test_secret_santa.py: asserts `asignaciones == {Alice: Bob, Bob: Charlie, Charlie: Alice}` without seeding random

expected_findings.reason: the shuffle is random: asserting one mapping is flaky by construction

cases.name: config-read-outside-config
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/services/email_service.py: added `smtp_server = os.getenv('SMTP_SERVER', 'smtp.gmail.com')` instead of receiving it from Config

expected_findings.reason: configuration read outside the Config object

cases.name: yaml-key-missing-from-the-example
cases.diff: config.py reads a new `app.dry_run` key; config/settings.example.yaml untouched and README not updated

expected_findings.reason: a key that exists only in the private settings.yaml breaks the next clone of the repo

cases.name: unchained-bare-exception
cases.diff: src/invisible_friend/utils/file_handler.py: new `except Exception: raise Exception('error')` swallowing the original error

expected_findings.reason: bare Exception instead of InvisibleFriendError, and the cause is lost without `from e`

cases.name: clean-add-yaml-key
cases.diff: config.py reads a new `app.presupuesto` with a default and exposes it as a property; added to config/settings.example.yaml with a fake value, documented in the README, and tests/test_config.py covers the default and the parsed value

cases.name: clean-new-restriction-rule
cases.diff: validators.py adds a rule rejecting pairs from the same household; symmetric frozenset lookup preserved; tests cover both directions plus the unsatisfiable AssignmentError path with fake names
